'''davowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngege|ngege]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngege|ngege]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| davowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæveweth|dæveweth]] || [[word:dævewej|dævewej]] || [[word:dævewesh|dævewesh]] || [[word:dævewe|dævewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:davovowoth|davovowoth]] || [[word:davovowoj|davovowoj]] || [[word:davovowosh|davovowosh]] || [[word:davovowo|davovowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:davowoth|davowoth]] || [[word:davowoj|davowoj]] || [[word:davowosh|davowosh]] || [[word:davowo|davowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:davofwoth|davofwoth]] || [[word:davofwoj|davofwoj]] || [[word:davofwosh|davofwosh]] || [[word:davofwof|davofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davowotho|davowotho]] || [[word:davowojo|davowojo]] || [[word:davowosho|davowosho]] || [[word:davowoko|davowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davowoth|davowoth]] || [[word:davowoj|davowoj]] || [[word:davowosh|davowosh]] || [[word:davowo|davowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davowothol|davowothol]] || [[word:davowojol|davowojol]] || [[word:davowoshol|davowoshol]] || [[word:davowokol|davowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davowothotho|davowothotho]] || [[word:davowojojo|davowojojo]] || [[word:davowoshosho|davowoshosho]] || [[word:davowoko|davowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davowothon|davowothon]] || [[word:davowojon|davowojon]] || [[word:davowoshon|davowoshon]] || [[word:davowokon|davowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davowothoro|davowothoro]] || [[word:davowojoro|davowojoro]] || [[word:davowoshoro|davowoshoro]] || [[word:davowokoro|davowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
